g.text: Four metric types: pick by signal shape, not by name
Each type is built for a different question. Misuse cascades into broken dashboards.
Never reads raw value. Survives scrape gaps - resolution loss only.
Fragile for rapidly-changing values - inter-scrape spikes vanish.
bucket counts; percentiles computed at query time
Buckets are just counters - sum across instances, then quantile. CORRECT global p99.
Real global p99 could be 200ms ... or 600ms. The raw distribution is gone.
